plugin.extension:
<productCreator creatorClass="com.raytheon.viz.volumebrowser.loader.TimeSeriesProductCreator" <<<<<<< HEAD plugins="goessounding,poessounding,bufrmosLAMP,modelsounding,radar,ldadmesonet" ======= plugins="goessounding,poessounding,profiler,bufrmosLAMP,modelsounding,radar,ldadmesonet" >>>>>>> 3a1a5c9814b49f276bea4ebd9e584974d6ea7a11 resourceType="time_series">
<productCreator creatorClass="com.raytheon.uf.viz.volumebrowser.dataplugin.point.PointCrossSectionProductCreator" <<<<<<< HEAD plugins="goessounding,poessounding,bufrua,modelsounding" ======= plugins="goessounding,poessounding,profiler,bufrua,modelsounding" >>>>>>> 3a1a5c9814b49f276bea4ebd9e584974d6ea7a11 resourceType="cross_section">
<productCreator creatorClass="com.raytheon.uf.viz.volumebrowser.dataplugin.point.PointTimeHeightProductCreator" <<<<<<< HEAD plugins="goessounding,poessounding,bufrua,modelsounding,radar" ======= plugins="goessounding,poessounding,profiler,bufrua,modelsounding,radar" >>>>>>> 3a1a5c9814b49f276bea4ebd9e584974d6ea7a11 resourceType="time_height">
<productCreator creatorClass="com.raytheon.viz.volumebrowser.loader.VarHeightProductCreator" <<<<<<< HEAD plugins="goessounding,poessounding,bufrua,modelsounding,radar" ======= plugins="goessounding,poessounding,profiler,bufrua,modelsounding,radar" >>>>>>> 3a1a5c9814b49f276bea4ebd9e584974d6ea7a11 resourceType="var_height">
<productCreator creatorClass="com.raytheon.viz.volumebrowser.loader.VarHeightHodoProductCreator" <<<<<<< HEAD plugins="radar" ======= plugins="radar,profiler" >>>>>>> 3a1a5c9814b49f276bea4ebd9e584974d6ea7a11 resourceType="sounding">
